articles.author: Lee Ying Shan
articles.title: Asia-Pacific markets trade higher as investors assess U.S.-Iran peace deal diplomacy - CNBC
articles.description: While oil prices fell in U.S. trading, reports that Tehran intends to keep its enriched uranium stockpile within the country stand to complicate negotiations with the U.S.
articles.content:
Asia-Pacific markets traded higher Friday as investors assess U.S.-Iran diplomatic efforts at reaching a peace deal in the Middle East.
